functional_requirements.title: Record Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher records a student's grade for a course. Validates student existence, course existence, score range (0-100), and prevents duplicate grade records.

functional_requirements.title: Update Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher updates an existing grade record. Validates grade record existence and updates score and recorded_at timestamp.

functional_requirements.title: Delete Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher deletes a grade record. Validates grade record existence and removes it.

functional_requirements.title: Get Student Grades
functional_requirements.description: Retrieve all grades for a student, compute average, total credits, and GPA. Display grades with letter grades.

functional_requirements.title: Get Course Grades
functional_requirements.description: Retrieve all grades for a course, compute average, max, min, and distribution of letter grades.

functional_requirements.title: List Grades by Class
functional_requirements.description: List grades for a class, optionally filtered by course. Compute class average and rank students by score.

functional_requirements.title: Get Grade Report
functional_requirements.description: Generate a text report for a student including all subject grades, average, GPA, and credit summary.

functional_requirements.title: Get Course Statistics
functional_requirements.description: Compute statistics for a course: average, standard deviation, pass rate, and grade distribution percentages.

functional_requirements.title: Add Student
functional_requirements.description: Add a new student with unique student_id. Validates no duplicate student_id.

functional_requirements.title: Add Course
functional_requirements.description: Add a new course with unique course_id. Validates no duplicate course_id.

non_functional_requirements.description: Data consistency across three data sources must be maintained during grade operations.
The system should provide clear error messages for invalid operations.

acceptance_criteria.description: Record grade: valid student, course, score 0-100, no duplicate -> success
Record grade: duplicate student-course -> failure with message
Update grade: valid grade_id -> success with new letter grade
Get student grades: returns grades, average, total credits, GPA
Get course grades: returns grades, average, max, min, distribution
List class grades: returns students with scores and ranks, class average
Get grade report: returns formatted text report
Get course stats: returns average, std_dev, pass_rate, grade_distribution

storage.details: Three independent in-memory data sources: students, courses, grades

glossary.GPA: Grade Point Average, calculated as weighted average of grade points (A=4.0, B=3.0, C=2.0, D=1.0, F=0) weighted by course credits.
glossary.Standard Deviation: Measure of score dispersion in course statistics.

global_state_sources.description: Stores student information with fields: student_id, name, class, enrollment_year.
Stores course information with fields: course_id, name, credit, teacher.
Stores grade records with fields: grade_id, student_id, course_id, score, recorded_at.

input_spec.description: Input is provided via the manage_grade function with two arguments: command (string) and grade_data (dictionary). The grade_data contains fields depending on the command.

schema.command: string - one of: record_grade, update_grade, delete_grade, get_student_grades, get_course_grades, list_class_grades, get_grade_report, get_course_stats, add_student, add_course

output_spec.description: Output is a JSON object with fields: success (boolean), message (string), and data (object containing operation-specific data).

examples.message: 该学生此课程已有成绩记录
